privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/smart_dedup. The file smart_dedup.py contains three specific bugs to fix: 1) partial_hashing (hashes only the first 2048 bytes), 2) link_crash (fails to remove an existing target file before calling os.link, causing FileExistsError), and 3) size_filter (arbitrarily ignores files smaller than 1024 bytes). The agent must fix these bugs and pass the tests in tests/test_dedup.py without modifying the test file itself. A passing score is 85 or higher.
